overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character exploring a desert motel or residential complex with colorful wooden buildings and satellite dishes. The character walks through covered walkways, emerges to view a vast salt flat, then explores the open courtyard between buildings.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered corridor between blue and white buildings

entered.detail: wooden slatted roof providing partial shade over the corridor
smooth painted blue exterior wall of residential unit
white wooden siding with window frames
thick brown wooden posts supporting the roof structure
white wooden railing along the porch of the white building

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow covered walkway between two buildings. The corridor features a wooden slatted roof overhead, a blue painted wall on the right, and a white wooden building with porch railing on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior walkway along yellow building with porch

events.description: exits covered walkway and turns right along yellow building exterior

agents.ego_description: turns right corner and walks along the exterior of a yellow building with white porch railings

entered.detail: bright yellow painted wooden exterior wall of the building
white wooden picket fence railing along the building porch
large white satellite dish mounted on the roof

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered corridor and turns right to walk along a yellow building with white porch railings. A satellite dish is visible on the roof ahead as the scene opens to direct sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open salt flat overlook at desert's edge

events.description: emerges from building corridor into open area overlooking vast salt flat
character stops at the edge, looks out at the landscape, then turns around

agents.ego_description: walks to the edge of the paved area, stops to look at the salt flat and mountains, then turns to walk back

entered.detail: vast white salt flat or dry lake bed stretching to the horizon
distant mountain range with snow-capped peaks on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide open area at the edge of the residential complex, revealing a vast salt flat and distant mountain range. The character pauses at the edge to observe the landscape before turning to walk back.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard between colorful motel buildings

events.description: character turns 180 degrees and begins walking back through the complex

agents.ego_description: turns around and walks back through the residential complex, passing yellow, blue, and white buildings

entered.detail: blue painted wooden building with brown support beams and porch
weathered white wooden building with brown trim and multiple windows

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks back through the open courtyard of the residential complex, passing between colorful buildings including a blue structure on the right and weathered white wooden homes. Satellite dishes are visible on the rooftops throughout the area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the enclosure of a narrow walkway into a vast, sun-drenched desert landscape before returning to a colorful residential courtyard. It begins within a shaded corridor beneath a wooden slatted roof, flanked by a blue wall and a white porch railing. As the character exits the covered path, the scene opens into direct sunlight while moving alongside a yellow building topped with a satellite dish. The view then expands dramatically as the character reaches the edge of the complex, revealing a wide salt flat and a distant mountain range. Finally, the camera turns back toward the interior of the complex, gliding through an open courtyard between weathered white homes and blue structures dotted with rooftop satellite dishes.
